data.title: Ready Capital Corp reported Q2 2025 GAAP loss per share of $(0.31), distributable loss per share of $(0.14), and distributable loss per share before realized losses of $(0.10).
data.description: The loss per common share from continuing operations based on GAAP is at $0.31, while the distributable loss per common share stands at $0.14. Additionally, before realized losses, the distributable loss per common share is reported at $0.10.

data.title: Inovalis REIT released Q2 2025 financial results in Toronto. Find details in MD&A on their website.
data.description: In Toronto, Inovalis Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: INO.UN) announced its financial performance for the quarter ending June 30, 2025. The unaudited Consolidated Financial Statements and Management’s Discussion and Analysis for Q2 2025 can be accessed on the REIT’s website (www.inovalisreit.com) and at www.sedarplus.ca. All figures, except rental rates, square footage, and per unit amounts, are displayed in thousands of Canadian dollars or Euros. For detailed financial information, visit the specified websites.

data.title: Hampton Financial Corp. finishes non-brokered private placement of debentures.
data.description: Authorities have reported a significant increase in COVID-19 cases in the past week, with over 10,000 new cases and 150 deaths. This surge has prompted officials to implement stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus. The total number of cases in the region now stands at more than 50,000, with a death toll exceeding 800. Hospitals are operating at full capacity, and healthcare workers are facing immense pressure. The public is urged to adhere to safety guidelines and get vaccinated to mitigate the impact of the ongoing crisis.
Justin Osborne tenders resignation as non-executive director

data.title: Teen driver insurance rates are rising significantly, as per new analysis by CheapInsurance.com. Parents need to prepare for this as back-to-school season approaches. Los Angeles, Aug. 7, 2025. #InsuranceHike
data.description: A recent study conducted by CheapInsurance.com has identified specific strategies to save money as families nationwide gear up for the upcoming back-to-school season. With the analysis offering a breakdown of key information by state, it sheds light on the financial challenges that parents of teenage drivers might encounter. Released on August 7, 2025, the findings provide crucial insights for families across the country, highlighting the need for cost-effective approaches as they navigate this period. The comprehensive report aims to assist parents in managing expenses associated with their teen drivers during the busy back-to-school period.
Pam Bondi: ‘Today, and are announcing a $50 MILLION REWARD for information leading to the arrest of Nicolás Maduro.’

data.title: RioCan reports strong Q2 results with 9.3% FFO growth to $0.47 per unit; achieved 51.5% new leasing spreads. Closed 4 Living assets sales.
data.description: In Toronto, RioCan Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: REI.UN) unveiled its financial performance for the periods ending June 30, 2025. Notably, there was a significant increase in FFO per unit by 9.3%, reaching $0.47. The Trust capitalized on market opportunities, resulting in new leasing spreads of 51.5% and blended leasing spreads of 20.6%. Additionally, RioCan closed four firm sales of RioCan Living™ assets, bringing the total dispositions to five for the year.

data.title: MPLX LP priced $4.5 billion senior notes offering in public offering. $1.25 billion consists of 4.800% senior notes due.
data.description: In Findlay, Ohio, on August 7, 2025, MPLX LP (NYSE: MPLX) revealed the pricing of $4.5 billion in unsecured senior notes through an underwritten public offering. This offering includes $1.25 billion in aggregate principal amount of 4.800% senior notes due...

data.title: SEC-Ripple case to end after appeal dropped. Ripple ordered to pay $125M for using XRP as unregistered securities.
data.description: Exactly 365 days after being directed to pay $125 million as a result of regulatory measures due to utilizing XRP without proper registration, Ripple filed the necessary paperwork.

data.title: Winmark Corporation executive Grassle decides not to stand for re-election to Board; served for 24 years.
data.description: In Minneapolis today, Winmark Corporation (Nasdaq: WINA) disclosed that Jenele C. Grassle will not seek re-election to the Winmark Board of Directors at the upcoming Annual Meeting of Shareholders in April 2026. Ms. Grassle, a board member since 2001, is currently involved with the Compensation and Nominating Committees. Over the last twenty-four years, her impact on Winmark has been noteworthy.
Bessent remarks on report of BRICS combating US tariffs

data.title: Trend Micro's Zero Day Initiative marks 20 years, encouraging security research with a bug bounty program. #IndustryLeader
data.description: In efforts to enhance customer safety and industry security, Trend Micro Incorporated, a global cybersecurity leader (TYO: 4704; TSE: 4704), marks the 20th anniversary of its Zero Day Initiative (ZDI). This bug bounty program serves as the largest initiative of its kind globally, aiming to engage security researchers in uncovering vulnerabilities. Through ZDI, incentives are offered to researchers for their discoveries, promoting a proactive approach towards safeguarding systems. This initiative plays a crucial role in mitigating potential cyber threats, contributing to a more resilient digital landscape.

data.title: Winklevoss brothers invest in Trump sons' crypto miner, buying American Bitcoin with BTC, confirms Hut 8 CEO.
data.description: The CEO of Hut 8, Asher Genoot, informed investors that today, the Winklevoss brothers made a purchase of American Bitcoin using BTC instead of cash.

data.title: Sweetgreen's Q2 revenue misses estimates at $185.58M, shares drop. Q2 loss of 20 cents beats 11-cent estimate. Same-store sales decline by 7.6%.
data.description: Sweetgreen Inc (NYSE: SG) shares are plummeting in after-hours trading following disappointing financial results and a revised full-year forecast. In Q2, the company reported revenue of $185.58 million, falling short of the estimated $194.34 million. The Q2 loss also exceeded expectations at 20 cents compared to 11 cents. Total revenue saw a slight 0.5% increase year-over-year, yet same-store sales dropped by 7.6%. Sweetgreen opened nine new restaurants during the period. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Pinterest stock drops post-Q2 results with weaker earnings despite strong sales, not meeting expectations like Meta or Reddit.
data.description: Pinterest's stock took a hit after their Q2 results did not meet expectations, in contrast to the strong performances of Meta and Reddit. Despite reporting stronger-than-expected sales, Pinterest's earnings fell short, causing a decline in their stock value. This news was highlighted in an article on Investor's Business Daily.
